context.projectOverview: Sprint 5 of 5 (FINAL). Digest builder aggregating research runs in [since, now] into a markdown + JSON artifact under .bober/research/digests/<date>.{md,json} for the Telegram bot (sibling spec) to push later. `bober research digest --since <iso>`. Transport OUT of scope. Empty window => explicit no-new-research digest (both files). Non-sensitive summary content only.

completedSprints.summary: 20d42cb runner -> vault note + Finding (notes hold frontmatter {jobId,question,models,generatedAt})

relevantFiles: src/research/note-writer.ts + runner.ts (what a produced run/note looks like; vaultRoot)

principles: Read .bober/principles.md. Hard gates: strict TS zero errors; ZERO lint errors; ESM .js imports; Zod; async fs; CLOCK INJECTION (now injected into buildDigest; new Date() only at CLI .action boundary). NON-SENSITIVE content only — titles/summaries, NOT raw PHI/financial values.

curatorFindings.collectRunsSource: The REAL collectRuns(since, now) reads VAULT RESEARCH NOTES (listNotes + readNote under <vaultRoot>/research/, filter by frontmatter.generatedAt in [since, now]) — NOT hub Findings. Reason: Findings are content-deduped by sha256(domain|title|kind) (finding-store.ts:121-126) so re-runs supersede prior and UNDERCOUNT the window; and Findings carry no source-link path whereas each note is a 1:1 dated artifact whose PATH is the source link. buildDigest itself takes an INJECTED collectRuns dep so unit tests use fake runs with NO vault/FactStore.
curatorFindings.dualArtifact: Mirror src/hub/priority-md.ts for the PURE markdown render (build lines[] then join('\n')). Mirror src/fleet/index.ts:69 for the JSON write (JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) + '\n'). JSON shape: {since, now, generatedAt, runs:[{title, topFinding, generatedAt, source}]}. Markdown: heading + one bullet per run (title, top finding, source link).
curatorFindings.filename: <date> = now.slice(0,10) => YYYY-MM-DD (matches note-writer.ts:24 / medical/audit.ts:31). Write both .bober/research/digests/<date>.md and <date>.json.
curatorFindings.ensureDir: Use ensureDir from src/state/helpers.ts — NOT src/utils/fs.ts (the CLI test whole-module-mocks utils/fs.js; keep real fs in digest.ts). Keep the CLI digest action thin: delegate fs to digest.ts.
curatorFindings.emptyWindow: When collectRuns returns [], render a markdown body that EXPLICITLY states no new research was produced in the window, and STILL write BOTH files (never throw, never empty file).

notes: Contract: .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-research-scheduler-5.json. Briefing: .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260628-research-scheduler-5-briefing.md. CLI: `digest --since <iso>` with default = last 24h computed at the .action boundary only. NON-GOALS: no Telegram bot/transport/rendering; no sensitive raw detail; do NOT change runner/cadence/egress; tick<->digest integration optional/additive. Do NOT modify src/medical/, src/fleet/, src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts, src/state/research-state.ts. This is the LAST sprint — make the whole feature cohere.
